title: Irish Beef Stew
description: A hearty and comforting beef stew made with tender chunks of beef, potatoes, and carrots. Serve with some crusty bread for a delicious meal.
instructions: 1. Cut the beef into 1-inch cubes and season with salt and pepper.
2. Heat some oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
3. Add the beef to the pot and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
4. Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
5. Add the beef stew to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add the potatoes and carrots to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
7. Add the browned beef back to the pot, along with the water.
8. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
9. Stir in the buttery flour to thicken the stew.
10. Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
